versions.version_description: Intermediate Difficulty with some more complex chords than other versions.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Dont Want To Miss A Thing

content:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
   This Romeo is bleeding but you can't see his blood[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                           [ch]G[/ch]
   It's nothing but some feelings that this old dog kicked up[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                               [ch]Am[/ch]
   It's been raining since you left me, now I'm drowning in the flood[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                            [ch]G[/ch]
   You see I've always been a fighter, but without you I give up[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                            [ch]G[/ch] 
   Now I can't sing the love songs, like the way it's meant to be[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                                     [ch]G[/ch]
Well, I guess I'm not that good anymore, but, baby, that's just me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
Yeah, I will love you, baby, always, and I will be there forever and a day, always[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] 
I'll be there till the stars don't shine[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Till the heavens burst and the words don't rhyme[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]       
I know when I die you'll be on my mind and I'll love you always[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Now the pictures that you left bihind are just memories of a different life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch] 
Some that made us laugh, some that made us cry[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
One that made you have to say goodbye[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                      
What I'd give to run my fingers through your hair[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Touch your lips, to hold you near[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch] 
When you say your prayers, try to understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I've made mistakes, I'm just a man[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
When he holds you close, when he pulls you near[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
When he says the words you've been needing to hear[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch] 
I'll wish I was him 'cause these words are mine[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
To say to you till the end of time that[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
Yeah, I will love you, baby, always, and I will be there forever and a day, always[/tab]

I'll be there till the stars don't shine[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Till the heavens burst and the words don't rhyme[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]       
I know when I die you'll be on my mind and I'll love you always[/tab]
  
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] 
  If you told me to cry for you, I could[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]    
  If you told me to die for you, I would [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
  Take a look at my face, there's no price I won't pay[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]
  To say these words to you[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  Well, there ain't no luck in these loaded dice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  But, baby, if you give me just one more try[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch] 
  We can pack up our old dreams, and our lives[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
